view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that 'All must be available for slot to show', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether all necessary roles (primary and assistant) are assigned and available for the booking. The linked use case mentions the need for both roles, yet the evidence only shows bookings without explicit assignments for both roles. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence to support or refute the requirement.
